phonofidelic

is a way for me to [do stuff] without the boundaries of a fixed profession. I rely on diverse and shared experiences from all aspects and periods of my life in order to bring forth unexpected results. The unexpected is perhaps what I value most in my work.

About me...

Phonofidelic is a way for me to do stuff without the boundaries of a fixed profession. I rely on diverse and shared experiences from all aspects and periods of my life in order to bring forth unexpected results. The unexpected is perhaps what I value most in my work.

Print

[move?/rewrite?] The process of printing an image or a piece of text repeatedly onto a surface is something that has always fascinated me. The feeling of laying down the first color of a screen print design you've been working on for the past ten hours is something like a witnessing a miracle in repeat.
Then comes the second color...
perhaps a third...

Web

[rewrite] I used to scoff at the idea of digital media. It seamed so temporary and transient, bits and pieces of throw-away ideas. But under that surface impression lay a whole new way of expressing [—]. The ideas may me transient and fleeting but they are anything but "throw-away".
Experiencing coding and computer science as a form of craft and/or art has given me something closer to a direct link to concepts that I was unable to approach appropriately from a visual arts perspective.

Sound

I've had the privilege of making and recording music with some wonderful people over the years. Among them are Sin Galore, Wild Fangs, Growth and Moralens Väktare.

Art

Contact
